title: Automatic indices cause undesirable type conversions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, value Float64, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', toFloat64('20.5'));
ALTER TABLE test_table UPDATE value = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Automatic indices trigger undesirable type conversions
